name: Bleed
summary: Loses HP at the start of its turn; bleed amount may stack. Remove with magical healing or DC 15 Heal.

name: Blinded
summary: Cannot see. -2 AC, loses Dex to AC, half speed, -4 on most Str/Dex skills, 50% miss chance against visual targets.

name: Confused
summary: Cannot act normally; roll on confusion table each turn (act normally / babble / hurt self / attack random).

name: Cowering
summary: Frozen in fear. Loses Dex to AC, -2 AC, can take no actions.

name: Dazed
summary: Stunned-lite: can take no actions but doesn't lose Dex to AC.

name: Dazzled
summary: -1 to attack rolls and sight-based Perception checks.

name: Deafened
summary: -4 initiative, automatic failure on auditory Perception checks, 20% spell failure for verbal-component spells.

name: Dead
summary: Dead.

name: Disabled
summary: At 0 HP. May take a single move or standard action per turn (not both, no full-round). Standard action deals 1 HP damage to self.

name: Dying
summary: Between -1 and -Con HP. Unconscious, helpless. Loses 1 HP per round unless stabilized.

name: Energy Drained
summary: Each negative level: -1 to attack, saves, skill checks, ability checks; -5 HP. Two saves at -CON before becoming permanent.

name: Entangled
summary: -2 attack, -4 Dex, half speed, no run/charge. Spellcasting needs concentration check (DC 15 + spell level).

name: Exhausted
summary: -6 to Str and Dex, half speed, no run/charge. Becomes fatigued after 1 hour rest.

name: Fascinated
summary: Held captive by a performance. Flat-footed; -4 to reactive skill checks. Hostile action breaks the effect.

name: Fatigued
summary: -2 Str, -2 Dex, no run/charge. Becomes exhausted if fatigued again.

name: Flat-Footed
summary: Loses Dex bonus to AC; cannot make attacks of opportunity (unless has Combat Reflexes / Uncanny Dodge).

name: Frightened
summary: Shaken plus must flee at full speed. -2 attack, -2 saves, -2 skills.

name: Grappled
summary: Cannot move except by Escape Artist or break grapple; -4 Dex, -2 attack and most checks, loses Dex vs others. Spellcasting requires concentration (DC 10 + grappler's CMB + spell level).

name: Helpless
summary: Treated as having Dex 0; automatically fails Dex/Str saves; subject to coup de grace.

name: Incorporeal
summary: No physical body. Immune to non-magical attacks; 50% chance to ignore most damage from corporeal sources, even magical.

name: Invisible
summary: Cannot be seen. +2 to attack, ignores Dex bonus to AC of targets unaware. Reveals on attack (with most spells/effects).

name: Laughing
summary: Bursts out laughing for 1 round. Can only take a move action; can defend normally. Source: Fey Bloodline (Laughing Touch).

name: Nauseated
summary: Can take only a single move action per turn; cannot attack, cast, concentrate, or do anything requiring attention.

name: Panicked
summary: Drops carried items, flees at full speed away from source. -2 saves and skills. No actions other than fleeing.

name: Paralyzed
summary: Cannot move or act; treated as helpless. May still take purely mental actions.

name: Petrified
summary: Turned to stone. Considered unconscious. If shattered while petrified, the creature is destroyed.

name: Pinned
summary: Tightly grappled. Cannot move; treated as flat-footed; -4 AC vs others; cannot make most actions.

name: Prone
summary: Lying on the ground. -4 attack with melee, +4 AC vs ranged, -4 AC vs melee. Standing up is a move action that provokes.

name: Shaken
summary: -2 to attack rolls, saves, and skill checks.

name: Sickened
summary: -2 to attack rolls, weapon damage, saves, ability checks, skill checks.

name: Sleeping
summary: Unconscious and helpless. Can be woken by sound, light, or a touch.

name: Squeezing
summary: Moving through a too-small space: half speed, -4 attack, -4 AC, no run/charge.

name: Stable
summary: Below 0 HP but no longer dying. Naturally regains HP at slow rate.

name: Staggered
summary: Can take only a single move or standard action per turn (not both). No full-round actions.

name: Stunned
summary: Drops everything held; cannot take actions; -2 AC; loses Dex bonus to AC.

name: Unconscious
summary: Helpless and unaware.

name: Silenced
summary: Cannot cast V-component spells, command words, or speak.

name: Bracing
summary: Weapon set vs charge; deals double damage on first hit against a charging foe before it acts.

name: Pinned
summary: Helpless; immobilized in a grapple. Pin is broken when grappler stops maintaining it.

name: Diseased
summary: Carrying a disease. RAW: each disease has its own onset, frequency, and effect (often ability damage). Tracked as a marker; per-disease daily checks are out of v1 scope.
